column1: Dashboard      KPIs, crew & job-type breakdowns, chart (read this first)
Inventory      tbl_Inventory — SKU master, stock levels, reorder logic
Jobs           tbl_Jobs — every job as an order: dates, status, price, on-time
JobMaterials   tbl_JobMaterials — bill of materials linking jobs to inventory
On-Time Completion  Actual completion <= scheduled completion (completed jobs only)
Cycle Time          Days from quote date to actual completion
Start Delay         Actual start minus scheduled start (days)
Actual Material Cost SUM of line costs from JobMaterials (qty x unit cost)
Material Variance   Actual material cost minus quoted material cost (+ = over budget)
Inventory Turnover  Annual usage value / inventory value on hand
Reorder Flag        On-hand qty <= reorder point
